regression.red: The live gate exposed an obsolete Queue message-ID shape assertion and cancellation failure for a recovered queued job whose attempt was greater than zero.
regression.green: Queue IDs are treated as the provider's opaque string-or-null contract, and a TDD regression proves an expired-lease recovery can be terminally cancelled while version and tenant checks remain enforced.

sanitization: Counts, durations, stable capability names, and an exact source commit only; no database URL, Blob token, OIDC token, queue message ID, tenant ID, repository name, sandbox ID, artifact path, or provider resource identifier is present.
